fields.name: lang
fields.help_text: All the emails and documents sent to this contact will be translated in this language.

fields.name: tz
fields.help_text:
When printing documents and exporting/importing data, time values are computed according to this timezone.
If the timezone is not set, UTC (Coordinated Universal Time) is used.
Anywhere else, time values are computed according to the time offset of your web client.

fields.name: user_id
fields.help_text: The internal user in charge of this contact.

fields.name: vat
fields.help_text: The Tax Identification Number. Complete it if the contact is subjected to government taxes. Used in some legal statements.

fields.name: employee
fields.help_text: Check this box if this contact is an Employee.

fields.name: type
fields.help_text: Invoice & Delivery addresses are used in sales orders. Private addresses are only visible by authorized users.

fields.name: is_company
fields.help_text: Check if the contact is a company, otherwise it is a person

fields.name: partner_share
fields.help_text: Either customer (not a user), either shared user. Indicated the current partner is a customer without access or with a limited access created for sharing data.

fields.name: barcode
fields.help_text: Use a barcode to identify this contact.
